race.comment: STANDARD STREET (12) was a winner two back in the Alice then made her Darwin debut with a disappointing finish. Was shuffled back just at the wrong time when they were all going forward. Better for it and well worth another chance in a race where you're having to forgive most. COLLISON (13) raced on speed and boxed on well for fourth last time. Deserves a win and gets chance. BIDEN TIME (2) is a former Victorian making debut this area and does go well fresh. Watch the market closely. OUR SQUAMOSA (10) has been racing over the sharper trip and can improve out in journey. MODS (5) is better than last run and well worth another chance.
